news.title: Trump says U.S. will destroy Iran’s oil wells, Kharg Island without deal to 'immediately' reopen Hormuz Strait
news.summary: The U.S. will obliterate all of Iran's electric generating plants, oil wells and Kharg Island if a peace deal is not reached.

news.title: Russia welcomes arrival of oil tanker in Cuba after Trump softens approach to U.S. blockade
news.summary: A Russian oil tanker carrying a humanitarian shipment of 100,000 tons of crude oil reportedly arrived in Cuba on Monday. The shipment is part of a humanitarian effort to help the Cuban people.

news.title: Trump reportedly wants to 'take the oil in Iran' as Tehran targets water, power facilities in Kuwait
news.summary: The Middle East conflict has entered its fifth week, with attacks expanding across the region. The attacks are raising risks to energy and infrastructure, according to the U.N.

news.title: 401(k) alternative asset rule proposed by Labor Department
news.summary: The Department of Labor has proposed a rule regarding how plan sponsors and fiduciaries can include alternative assets in 401(k) retirement accounts.

news.title: Watch Fed Chair Jerome Powell speak live to an economics class at Harvard
news.summary: Powell's final scheduled public appearance before his term ends in May. This will be one of his last scheduled public appearances before he leaves the White House.

news.title: I’m 75 and retired. Should I put my life savings into CDs or hire a financial adviser to help?
news.summary: “At my age, I want minimal to moderate risk,” he says. “At his age, he wants minimal tomoderate risk.”

news.title: Why Oracle’s stock may be a ‘go-to’ AI winner that investors are overlooking
news.summary: Oracle's stock has been weighed down by fears of overspending on AI. Bernstein believes the company's big bet is on track to pay off.

news.title: Gas prices are nearing this ‘psychological wall.’ One group of drivers could cruise right through.
news.summary: “The economy feels a bit miserable right now,” one financial-wellness expert says. “I’m shifting from autopilot to a more intentional strategy.”

news.title: Gold’s bull run could be nearing its finish line, says UBS strategist
news.summary: Bullion prices may fall if the Federal Reserve decides to hold interest rates for the rest of the year, which the market has priced in.

news.title: The market’s wobble amid Iran war has left world-beating U.S. stocks ‘extremely cheap,’ says Bill Ackman
news.summary: Hedge-fund billionaire John Paulson says investors should ignore the bears. He says the U.S. economy is in good shape and will continue to do so.
